name: partita
description: CLI-backed Codex skill harness for user-defined workflow skills.
author: sayori

scripts.build: turbo run build --filter=@partita/generic-projection && rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/bin/partita.js
scripts.home:diff: pnpm build && node dist/bin/partita.js home diff
scripts.home:status: pnpm build && node dist/bin/partita.js home status
scripts.skill-sync: pnpm build && node dist/bin/partita.js skill sync
scripts.skill-status: pnpm build && node dist/bin/partita.js skill status
scripts.skill-verify: pnpm build && node dist/bin/partita.js skill verify
scripts.typecheck: turbo run build --filter=@partita/generic-projection && turbo run typecheck --filter=@partita/generic-projection && tsgo --noEmit
scripts.verify: pnpm generate:check && node dist/bin/partita.js verify && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm knip
